title: Progression Core
summary: In-place L2 module: manual/auto/threshold leveling tracks, baked int64 curve codegen (zero float in C), T5 tick hard-caps (per-track levelup cap + cascade-depth cap); reads/spends currency through items-core's purse API.
dependencies: templates/template/content/progression.json + content/items.json (currency_def cross-check) (or a game-local progression catalog)
template or game C runtime using the generated progression_tracks.gen.{h,c} + the generated progression save fragment (features/game-state)

registers.note: Describes the EXISTING wiring in templates/template/CMakeLists.txt (target_sources/ctest) -- progression-core is an in-place module (precedent features/game-state / features/items-core), not an install-script target. This section documents the consuming game's provisioning, it does not perform it.
